chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1353 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 11403/16 3. For Katcha Peshi. 19.10.2016. Mr. Bhagwan Das Bheel, Advocate for the petitioner. -.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner wants to withdraw the instant Constitutional Petition simplicitor. His vakalatnama is available in case file which does provide him an authority, inter alia, to withdraw the case. Consequently, this Constitutional Petition is dismissed as withdrawn with no order as to costs alongwith listed application. JUDGE Ali Haider
